items.claim: Stuart Nichols lacks the offensive wrestling ability to take his opponents to the ground.
items.quote: Stuart Nicholas has not been able to prove his wrestling abilities to get the fight to the ground where he needs it to be.

items.claim: Alden Korea has demonstrated solid offensive and defensive wrestling in his recent fights.
items.quote: he's proven his offensive and defensive wrestling is actually solid.

items.claim: Alden Korea possesses a high-level get-up game that prevents opponents from racking up control time.
items.quote: Very good get up game from Alden Korea.

items.claim: Alvin Hines's past performances are unreliable indicators of his current ability due to his positive test for steroids.
items.quote: you can't really put a whole lot on it because even when he looked decent getting pieced up, he was on steroids.

items.claim: RJ Harris utilizes a 'tall man's defense' that relies on leaning back, leaving him vulnerable to strikers.
items.quote: he has this tall man's defense where he is constantly the type to lean back and he puts his head back

items.claim: RJ Harris is a high-volume submission hunter who frequently attempts front headlock chokes.
items.quote: he's probably attempting two subs per round in his fights.

items.claim: Phil Lu's performance against Navajo Sterling should be discounted because he took the fight on short notice and up a weight class.
items.quote: Phil Lu took that fight on short notice up a weight class.

items.claim: Both Alvin Hines and RJ Harris are unlikely to show rapid skill development because they train at small-town gyms rather than elite camps.
items.quote: I don't really have a ton of faith in their overall development as a fighter. It's not like these guys are flying, you know, across the country. They're going to an American Top Team, a big location

items.claim: Dioni Barbosa is a well-rounded fighter who performs better than her 9-4 record suggests.
items.quote: I think Barbosa is a lot better than her record implies. I think she's very well-rounded.

items.claim: Anna Melisano's success in MMA is driven more by her physicality and build than by her technical skill set.
items.quote: Anna Melisano is one of these girls where her physicality and her build I feel like have taken her farther than her actual skill sets.
